dataFreshnessWarning: Data updated as of 11:56 AM PDT, March 26, 2026 (Day 27). IRGC Wave 82 fired two ballistic missile salvos at central Israel. IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri killed at Bandar Abbas. UAE struck — 2 killed in Abu Dhabi by intercepted missile debris. Hezbollah kills 1 in Nahariya. IDF strikes Mashhad 14th airbase (first on city) and Tabriz airport (F-5, F-4 destroyed). Kuwait arrests 6-member Hezbollah assassination cell. Trump Cabinet meeting: Iran 'begging' for deal, revealed Iran let 8-10 tankers through Hormuz. WSJ: Trump wants to 'wrap up' conflict. Brent $105.85/bbl (+32.6% from pre-war). G7 in France: Germany calls war 'a catastrophe,' Kallas 'not Europe's war.' Hormuz blockade Day 24. Refresh frequency: 2-3x daily.
